name: Social Media Strategist – AI Powered Automation

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ (() => { const d = $json; return JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: 'You are an expert Social Media Strategist.

TOPIC: ' + d.topic + '
BRAND VOICE: ' + d.brand_voice + '
PLATFORM FOCUS: ' + d.platform_focus + '

TREND CONTEXT:
' + d.trend_context + '

Write posts for LinkedIn (150-300 words, professional, hook first line, 3-5 hashtags, end with CTA) and Twitter (max 260 chars, punchy, max 2 hashtags).

Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown:
{"linkedin_post": "...", "twitter_post": "...", "content_theme": "...", "engagement_hook": "...", "best_post_time": "...", "followup_content": "..."}' }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.75, maxOutputTokens: 3000 } }); })() }}

parameters.text:
⚠️ *No pending topics found!*

All topics have been posted. Add new rows to Google Sheet with status = pending to continue.
